steps.title: Use the initial balance
steps.content: An exponential account model has the form $A(t)=a(b)^t$. The initial balance is $35{,}800.00$, so $a=35{,}800.00$.

steps.title: Check the growth factor
steps.content:
Test the listed growth factor $1.05$ at $t=13$:
$$35{,}800(1.05)^{13}$$
This rounds to $67{,}506.24$, so the initial value and base fit the data. The answer is A.
